params.name: Azoth
params.description:
On Nov 28, 124 AD, Azoth was created in an alchemy lab.
Azoth is a universal solvent and panacea produced through alchemy. Along with the Philosopher's Stone, Azoth is one of the treasures pursued by alchemists, who believe that it is the liquified soul found in all matter that can magically transform substances from one form to another.
